description.en_US: Contact management with multi-phone/email, group tags. Type /name in the editor to insert a contact link, or use /add-contact slash command. Click phone numbers to copy.
description.zh_CN: 通讯录管理插件。支持多号码、多邮箱、分组标签。输入/名字自动插入联系人链接，/add-contact 快速添加。点击号码复制到剪贴板。
description.default: Contact management plugin. Multi-phone/email fields, group tags. Type /name to insert contact link, /add-contact to add.
